suggestion.title: Submit Suggestion
suggestion.subtitle: Your changes will be reviewed by an admin
suggestion.reasonPlaceholder: e.g., Fix typo in variable name, Optimize loop performance, Add missing import...
suggestion.reasonHint: Be specific about what you changed and why. This helps reviewers approve faster.
suggestion.needReason: Please provide a reason for your suggestion

chat.name: PIE
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm PIE, the AI teaching assistant created by the author "阡陌交通_". Ask me anything about the "Handmaking LLM" tutorial series!
chat.visionLoginHint: Log in to let PIE see your screen
chat.visionOnHint: PIE can see your current screen
chat.visionOffHint: Let PIE see your current screen
chat.visionOnTitle: Vision ON: I can see your current page
chat.visionOffTitle: Vision OFF: click to let me see your page
chat.connectionError: Cannot reach the backend ({apiUrl}). Please check: 1) the backend service is running, 2) NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in .env.local is correct (use http://localhost:8000 for local dev).
